case_title: DEL MONTE SF EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS MITCHELL MIKE J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $991.34 FILED BY DEL MONTE SF EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL MIKE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL MIKE J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL MONTE SF EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL MIKE J. $991.34 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,036.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL MIKE J.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION/OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR 4/26/94 9AM DEPT 6.
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION GRANTED: EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $25. TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL MIKE J.
